title: strychnos lucida
intro: Strychnos lucida, a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, is native to the tropical regions of Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos lucida include its antimalarial and antiparasitic properties, as well as its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Strychnos lucida is typically prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
